What we do

Colorado Springs' community bike shop — where every ride gives back

The Pedal Station is a social enterprise bike shop run by Kids on Bikes, a Colorado Springs nonprofit. Unlike a typical bike shop, every purchase and repair you make here goes directly back into youth cycling programs across El Paso County — earn-a-bike initiatives, bike libraries, and partnerships with local youth-serving agencies.

Launched in 2016 as the region's first community bike center, the Pedal Station keeps bikes moving and kids riding all year long. When you shop or get your bike serviced with us, you're not just a customer — you're part of the mission.

Access to a quality bicycle drops sharply with household income. Making bikes accessible — before the riding and education — is our first priority. Your dollars ride with us.

What we offer

New and used bikes for every rider in Colorado Springs

We carry a full selection of new and quality-used bikes for kids and adults. Every used bike is donated, fully inspected, and tuned by our mechanics before it hits the floor.

✓ 30-day warranty on all bikes

New bikes

Quality brands at accessible prices for kids and adults — road, mountain, and cruiser.

Used bikes

Donated bikes lovingly restored by our mechanics. Affordable and road-ready.

Gear & accessories

Helmets, new and used parts, clothing, Kids on Bikes jerseys, and water bottles.

Marin Kona Woom Retrospec

Full-service repairs

Bike repair in Colorado Springs — any bike, any era

Our experienced mechanics service all types of bikes — vintage, modern, kids', adult, road, and mountain. We stock a wide inventory of used parts to keep older bikes on the road affordably. Not sure what your bike needs? Bring it in — estimates are always free.

Tune-up
9 + 5 parts allowance
Includes a safety check, bike wash, brake adjustment, drivetrain adjustment, lateral wheel true, hub adjustment, BB check, and standard chain clean & lube.
Any additional service added to a tune-up is charged at a 50% discount from its standalone rate.

Donate your bike

Have a bike you no longer ride? Donate it to Kids on Bikes. We accept kids' and adult bikes at the Pedal Station or at Criterium Bike Shop (6150 Corporate Dr, 80919). A tax receipt is provided at time of donation.

Learn More at KidsonBikes.net

What's In the Shop

A rotating selection of bikes, gear, and parts — new arrivals and used finds. Stock changes fast. Call to reserve or come see us Tuesday–Saturday.

See something you like? Call or walk in to reserve it. All purchases must be made in person.
